---
title: "Page 2 - Interactive Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec03-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec03"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Interactive learning

_A brief explanation of the interactive task or tool to orient the learner._

---

## Try it

_Insert your interactive component here (e.g., a simulation, clickable diagram, or embedded JS activity)._

---

## Instructions

_Provide clear guidance on how to use the interactive element._

---

## What to notice

_Call out 2-3 specific features, trends, or behaviors the learner should pay attention to while interacting._

---

## Follow-up

_Add an optional reflection, interpretation, or next-step prompt for after the interaction is completed._

---

## Learning Activities



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-important}
**Key Emphasis**

<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this true false._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="true_false"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

<!-- editable:start questions -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the true_false format here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction if appropriate for this scenario response task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.scenario-response}
**Scenario Challenge**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe a realistic or authentic scenario corresponding to the learning objectives._]

**What would you do?**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Ask the learner to respond or take action in this scenario._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Guidance and Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for different responses._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief wrap-up or next-step prompt after the scenario._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Introduce why this point matters._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.callout-important}
**Key Emphasis**

<!-- editable:start content -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the emphasized point, warning, or key takeaway here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add interpretation or implications of this point._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this true false._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.quiz data-variant="true_false"}
**Knowledge Quiz**

<!-- editable:start questions -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add questions matching the true_false format here._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief summary or reflection prompt after completing the assessment._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction if appropriate for this scenario response task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.scenario-response}
**Scenario Challenge**

**Scenario Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Describe a realistic or authentic scenario corresponding to the learning objectives._]

**What would you do?**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Ask the learner to respond or take action in this scenario._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Guidance and Reflection**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the rationale or trade-offs for different responses._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a brief wrap-up or next-step prompt after the scenario._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Frame this guided reflection task._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.reflection data-variant="guided"}
**Personal Reflection**

<!-- editable:start prompt -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a reflection question tailored to the topic._]
<!-- editable:end -->
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a closing thought or transition._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec03-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Assessment Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec03-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Overview Page Variant</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
